name: Friend of
description: A trusted companion or close acquaintance

name: Enemy of
description: Actively hostile or in personal conflict

name: Rival of
description: Competes or clashes without full hostility

name: Mentor of
description: Guides or teaches the other character

name: Student of
description: Is guided or taught by the other character

name: Family of
description: A blood relative or adoptive family member

name: Ally of
description: Works toward shared goals without deep friendship

name: Informant of
description: Secretly supplies information to the other

name: Former Friend of
description: Once close; now estranged or fallen out

name: Colleague of
description: Works alongside without strong personal bond

name: Acquainted with
description: Knows of each other — extent unknown
